name: evspend
description: EVSpend — EV vs ICE cost calculator (vanilla HTML/CSS/JS, self-hosted Inter font, Chart.js MIT, Lucide ISC).

scripts.build:css: npx -y esbuild styles-app.css --minify --legal-comments=inline --target=es2020 > styles-app.min.css && npx -y esbuild styles-pages.css --minify --legal-comments=inline --target=es2020 > styles-pages.min.css
scripts.build:js: npx -y esbuild script.js --minify --legal-comments=inline --sourcemap=external --target=es2020 --outfile=script.min.js && npx -y esbuild verlauf.js --minify --legal-comments=inline --sourcemap=external --target=es2020 --outfile=verlauf.min.js
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js
